title: The Secret of Mayerling
writer: Jean Delannoy, Philippe Hériat, Jacques Rémy
actors: Jean Marais, Dominique Blanchar, Claude Farell
plot: On the morning of January 30, 1889, the Archduke Rodolphe de Habsbourg and his mistress Marie Vetsera were found dead. The remains of Rodolphe are discreetly repatriated to Hofburg, while that of Mary is hastily thrown into the de...
